content:
A self-indulgent and gratifying video to showcase my first 425 and some of the "cooler" boss fights involved. A fun little overview of the waves but from a casual instead of educational viewing.
https://youtu.be/09Dn1Pl0pcc

embeds.title: My first 425 D-Tide + clear showcases
embeds.description: A bit of a self-indulgent video honestly. Just wanted to show off some cool D-Tide clears as well as my first 425.
